name: Use of Incorrect Operator
description: The product accidentally uses the wrong operator (e.g., assignment instead of comparison, bitwise instead of logical), changing the program logic in security-relevant ways. These typically result from programmer typos and can cause unintended execution paths.
detection_pattern: A CONTROL[conditional] node contains a TRANSFORM[assignment] or TRANSFORM[bitwise_op] where a TRANSFORM[comparison] or TRANSFORM[logical_op] was expected, causing the control flow to behave incorrectly without a META[static_analysis] check catching the operator misuse.
